whatsNew.title: A What's new page to track updates
whatsNew.description: The 📣 icon in the header lists the features added to RaidOps over time, with a badge when there's something new to see.

manual.title: An in-app help manual
manual.description: Every page now has a "?" pointing to a step-by-step guide: Discord sign-in, character import, guild management (roster, settings, audit log), and more.

notifications.title: In-app notifications
notifications.description: A bell in the header alerts you when an action is needed on your end — e.g. configuring the Officer threshold for a guild you administer.

roster.title: The guild roster, as a real table
roster.description: Search, filters (class, spec, rank, join date), column sorting, and managing your own characters in the guild (join, change rank, leave) — all in one table.

getStarted.title: A guided path to get started on RaidOps
getStarted.description: A 4-step wizard (Discord, guild, Battle.net, roster) guides newcomers end to end, picking up exactly where they left off.

auditLog.title: Guild audit log
auditLog.description: Full history of notable guild actions (settings, joins/leaves, rank changes), filterable and sortable by column.

characterManagement.title: Advanced character management
characterManagement.description: Resync from Battle.net, deactivate, join/leave a guild, and set viable raid specs — all directly from the character card.

characterImport.title: Import your characters from Battle.net
characterImport.description: Link your Battle.net account and import your characters in a few clicks, with search and multi-select.

guildRegister.title: Register your guild
guildRegister.description: Invite the RaidOps bot to your Discord server to register your guild — registration finalizes automatically once the bot has joined.

guildList.title: Find your guilds
guildList.description: An overview of guilds already registered and accessible to you, and the ones you can register yourself as a Discord administrator.

discordAuth.title: Sign in with Discord
discordAuth.description: RaidOps uses your Discord account as your main identity — one-click sign-in, no password to manage.

roadmap.intro: What's planned or under consideration for RaidOps next. No guaranteed order or dates — just a sense of where the project is headed.

guildRegister.title: Guild registration
guildRegister.description: Inviting the Discord bot to register a guild.

guildList.title: Guild list
guildList.description: Overview of accessible and registerable guilds.

roster.title: Guild roster
roster.description: Full table: search, filters, sorting, member management.

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: Filterable history of notable guild actions.

notifications.title: In-app notifications
notifications.description: Alerts for actions needed on the officer side.

manual.title: Help manual
manual.description: Step-by-step guides available on every page.

guildCalendar.title: Guild calendar
guildCalendar.description: Absence management and raid event scheduling.

raidAssignments.title: Raid assignments
raidAssignments.description: Who does what during the raid (dispel, soak, interrupt…).

raidHistory.title: Raid history
raidHistory.description: Who was present, absent, or benched for each raid.

guildDashboard.title: Guild dashboard
guildDashboard.description: Day-to-day info: upcoming raids, characters involved, etc.

bisLists.title: BIS lists
bisLists.description: Managing each character's best-in-slot wish lists.

lootHistoryImport.title: Loot history import
lootHistoryImport.description: Pulling Gargul / RCLootCouncil history into the guild.

lootAwareRaidBuilder.title: Loot-aware raid building
lootAwareRaidBuilder.description: Loot assignments feeding into raid composition.

possibleCrafts.title: Possible crafts list
possibleCrafts.description: Seeing what each character can craft.

craftRequest.title: Request a craft from the guild
craftRequest.description: Find who in the guild can craft a given item.

dataExport.title: Data export
dataExport.description: Get an export (blob) of the data RaidOps stores about you.

bnetAccountDeletion.title: Battle.net account deletion
bnetAccountDeletion.description: Unlink and delete data tied to your Battle.net account.

discordAccountDeletion.title: Discord account deletion
discordAccountDeletion.description: Unlink and delete data tied to your Discord account.

characterDeletion.title: Character deletion
characterDeletion.description: Permanently delete a character from RaidOps.

responsiveness.title: Site responsiveness
responsiveness.description: Adapting the interface for small screens and mobile.

designPolish.title: Design polish
designPolish.description: A visual consistency pass across the app (Material).

warcraftLogsIntegration.title: Warcraft Logs integration
warcraftLogsIntegration.description: Raid log tracking directly inside RaidOps.

bossPerformanceTracking.title: Per-boss performance tracking
bossPerformanceTracking.description: CLA/RPB equivalent: consumables, specs and gear checks tracked boss by boss.

registered.title: My registered guilds
registered.subtitle: Select a guild to access its dahsboard.

admin.title: My unregistered guilds
admin.subtitle: The following guilds are unregistered, but you are administator of them. You can register them to start using RaidOps.

register.title: Register a guild
register.description: To activate RaidOps on this server, the bot needs to join your Discord server. By clicking the button below, you will be redirected to Discord to authorise the invitation. Registration will be completed automatically once the bot has been invited.

guildSettings.pageSubtitle: Configure the timezone and roster access rules.

rosterMode.label: Roster access
rosterMode.hintOpen: Any authenticated member can join the roster.
rosterMode.hintRole: Members with the required role or any higher role in the Discord hierarchy can join the roster.

roles.label: Roster access threshold
roles.empty: No assignable roles found on this server.
roles.hint: Click a role to set the minimum threshold. That role and all roles above it will have access to the roster.

officerThreshold.label: Officer access threshold
officerThreshold.hint: Select the minimum role required for Officer access. That role and all roles above it become Officers, independently of roster access. Discord server administrators always keep full access, regardless of this choice.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.officerThresholdNotConfigured: "{{ guildName }}" has no Officer access threshold configured yet — choose which Discord role grants Officer access in the guild settings.

auditLog.pageSubtitle: History of notable actions performed on this guild.

noServer.title: No eligible guild
noServer.description:
None of your guilds is currently registered for RaidOps. RaidOps requires you to be an administrator of a Discord server to register one yourself.
Join or create a Discord server, then come back here.

register.title: No guild registered
register.description: None of your guilds is currently registered for RaidOps. Being administrator of the following servers, you can register one yourself to start using RaidOps

getStarted.title: Welcome to RaidOps
getStarted.subtitle: Follow these few steps to set up your account and join or register your guild.

discordStep.description: Discord is the backbone of RaidOps. We use your Discord account as your main RaidOps account and to access the list of servers you belong to. Sign in to get started.

guildStep.intro: Behind every RaidOps guild, there's a Discord server.

registered.title: Guilds already accessible
registered.subtitle: Below are the guilds already registered on RaidOps, and whether their roster is accessible to you.

admin.title: Guilds you can register
admin.subtitle: Below are the Discord servers you administer, which you could register yourself to use RaidOps.
admin.settingsSubtitle: The bot has been invited — finish the setup to complete registration.

empty.title: No guild available
empty.description: None of your guilds is registered in RaidOps, and you're not an administrator of any Discord server. Join an already-registered server, or become an administrator of one to register it yourself.

bnetStep.notLinkedDescription: Link your Battle.net account to import and activate your characters.

linkStep.noGuilds: No guilds available at the moment. You can join a guild later from your characters page.

guilds.title: My guilds
guilds.empty: This character has not joined any guild yet.
guilds.noEligible: No guild is accessible for this character.

errors.alreadyMember: This character is already on this guild's roster.
errors.notAMember: This character is no longer on this guild's roster.
errors.rosterAccessDenied: You don't have the required Discord role to join this roster.
errors.guildNotConfigured: This guild's settings haven't been configured yet.
errors.forbidden: You're not a member of this Discord server.
errors.guildBotNotPresent: The RaidOps bot isn't present on this Discord server.

roster.title: Roster

addPanel.title: My available characters
addPanel.empty: All your characters are already in this guild.

roster.empty: You have no characters in this guild yet.

list.emptyFiltered: No character matches the active filters.
list.kickSuccess: Character removed from the guild roster.
list.kickConfirmMessage: {{name}} will be removed from this guild's roster. They can be added back later.

home.title: Manage your guild.
home.tagline: Roster, raids, loot, calendar — all in one place, connected to Discord.

features.heading: Everything you need to raid seriously.
features.subheading: One tool to organize, coordinate and progress with your guild.

roster.title: Roster & Characters
roster.desc: Manage who plays what. Track every member's class, role and item level at a glance.

calendar.title: Raid Calendar
calendar.desc: Schedule events, manage sign-ups and keep the whole guild on the same page.

loot.title: Loot Management
loot.desc: Distribute loot fairly with a full history of assignments per character.

permissions.title: Permissions & Roles
permissions.desc: Map your Discord roles to fine-grained permissions. Each officer sees exactly what they need.

bot.title: Built-in Discord Bot
bot.desc: Event notifications, attendance confirmations and loot alerts sent directly to your channels.

stats.title: Guild Statistics
stats.desc: Track progression, raid performance and member growth across tiers.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.

bnet.notLinkedDescription: To ensure that each character created in RaidOps belongs to its rightful owner, we synchronize characters with Battle.net accounts. By linking your Battle.net account, you can easily import and sync your characters.
bnet.linkError: An error occurred while linking your Battle.net account. Please try again.
bnet.linkErrorSession: Session expired. Please try linking your Battle.net account again.
bnet.linkErrorBnet: Battle.net is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
bnet.popupBlocked: Allow popups to import your characters.

list.title: Characters
list.empty: RaidOps now knows your characters, but you haven't imported any yet. Click the button below to import your characters from Battle.net.

import.title: Import characters
import.allActive: All your synced characters are already imported.
import.noSyncedChars: No synced characters. Use "Sync Battle.net" first.
import.syncHint: Missing characters? Sync your Battle.net account.
import.fetchError: Failed to load characters. Please try again.
import.importError: An error occurred during import. Please try again.

sync.title: Sync characters
sync.branchDesc: Select the game branch to sync.
sync.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate character?
deactivateConfirm.body: This character will no longer be manageable in RaidOps. Your data is safe — re-importing the character will restore its full history.

raidSpecs.title: Raid-viable specs
raidSpecs.description: Check the specs each character can raid with, and pick the main spec.
raidSpecs.submitError: Failed to save specs. Please try again.
raidSpecs.importRolledBack: Specs not confirmed — import was cancelled.
